---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help improve this project
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

DESCRIBE THE BUG

A clear description of what the bug is.

TO REPRODUCE

Steps to reproduce the behavior.

1. Install the extension
2. Call the method or trigger the action
3. Observe the unexpected result

EXPECTED BEHAVIOR

What you expected to happen instead.

ENVIRONMENT

- Browser and version
- Extension manifest version (MV2 or MV3)
- chrome-network-monitor version
- Node.js version
- Operating system

ADDITIONAL CONTEXT

Any other details, screenshots, or logs that help explain the problem.
